channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Martina Navratilova takes shot at Gavin Newsom over California's trans-athlete policy
item.description: Tennis legend Martina Navratilova took a swipe at California Gov. Gavin Newsom over the state's transgender-athlete policy in girls high school sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: No. 7 St. John’s tops Butler 76-70 to clinch share of 1st Big East regular-season title in 33 years
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — RJ Luis Jr. scored 24 points and No. 7 St. John’s clinched a share of its first Big East regular-season title in 33 years by beating Butler 76-70 on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: CHRIS GOFF, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shaedon Sharpe makes a case for the best dunk in the NBA this season
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — Shaedon Sharpe has been one of the NBA's most gifted young dunk artists since he was selected seventh overall by the Portland Trail Blazers in the 2022 NBA draft. But he reached a new level on Wednesday night — possibly literally.
item.dc:creator: IAN NICHOLAS QUILLEN, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Pro surfer Makai McNamara placed in medically induced coma following terrifying wipeout
item.description: Makai McNamara did regain consciousness after he was hit by a huge wave at Banzai Pipeline. He was then transported to the hospital where he was put into a coma for 72 hours.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host 2025 jersey launch event at Belmont Park
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is gearing up for the launch of the team's 2025 jersey kit, with a special event slated for Thursday at Beach House, located at Belmont Park in Mission Beach.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Wrestling at Frontwave Arena: a preview with Thunder Rosa
item.description: All Elite Wrestling (AEW) is set to bring an action-packed night to Oceanside's Frontwave Arena on Wednesday, with stars like Thunder Rosa, a trailblazer in women's wrestling, ready to take center stage.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Chicago Bears NFL Scouting Combine Preview: Bears picks, workout schedule and more
item.description: The Chicago Bears have seven picks in the 2025 NFL Draft, including five picks in the first five rounds, and are looking to address needs in the offensive line, defensive line, running back, tight end, and safety positions.
item.dc:creator: Kaitlin Sharkey, WGN 9

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Rancho Bernardo 8, Patrick Henry 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-CIF Girls Water Polo Division One title game Rancho Bernardo beat Patrick Henry wins a great game in double overtime 8-7.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: RSL gets shut out in MLS season opener by San Jose
item.description: SAN JOSE, Calif. (ABC4 Sports) - From San Jose, Costa Rica to San Jose, California, Real Salt Lake has not been able to score a goal in this early part of the 2025 season. After a scoreless draw in the CONCACAF Champions Cup opener against C.S.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Lakers snap Nuggets' 9-game winning streak behind Luka Doncic's best game yet for LA
item.description: Luka Doncic scored 32 points in his best game by far with the Lakers, leading Los Angeles to a 123-100 runaway win at Denver on Saturday night that snapped the Nuggets' nine-game winning streak.
item.dc:creator: ARNIE STAPLETON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kent Johnson scores 2 goals, the Blue Jackets beat the Blackhawks 5-1 to end a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Zach Werenski scored and had two assists and Kent Johnson scored twice for the Columbus Blue Jackets in a 5-1 victory against the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: One-armed basketball player makes history with basket
item.description: When her high school basketball coach cut her from the team senior year, Baileigh Sinaman-Daniel refused to let that rejection, or the fact she was born with one arm, end her dream.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Singer of Canadian anthem at 4 Nations Face-Off changes lyric to protest Trump's 51st state remarks
item.description: The anthem singer who performed the Canadian anthem prior to the 4 Nations Face-Off championship game Thursday night changed a lyric in “O Canada” as a response to U.S. President Donald Trump's repeated remarks about making the country the 51st state.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO and KEN POWTAK, Associated Press, NewsNation
